death.attack.corrosion.player: %1$s was dissolved while trying to escape %2$s.

death.attack.immunity.item: %1$s was killed by its own immune system while trying to escape %2$s.
death.attack.immunity.player: %1$s was killed by its own immune system while trying to escape %2$s.

death.attack.infection.player: %1$s joined zombies while trying to escape %2$s.

effect.sona.analgesic.description: Grants immunity to Weakness, Mining Fatigue, and Slowness.
effect.sona.camouflage.description: Makes the enemies harder to detect from a distance.
effect.sona.confusion.description: Prevents the target from locking onto enemies and causes nausea to players.
effect.sona.corrosion.description: Gradually corrodes and damages armor. If the target has no armor, it deals direct damage. If the target is affected by Sliminess, Corrosion triggers an explosive reaction.
effect.sona.exposure.description: Makes the target easier to be detected even through obstacles.
effect.sona.frost.description: Slows movement and inflicts frost damage. If the target has Sliminess, it becomes completely frozen and unable to act. If Ignition is also present, the two effects cancel each other and apply Fragility.
effect.sona.ignition.description: Sets the target ablaze, dealing fire damage. If the target has Sliminess, the flames cannot be extinguished by water. If Frost is also present, the two effects cancel each other and apply Fragility.
effect.sona.immunity.description: Prevents infection buildup. Higher levels reflect special effects back onto infected attackers, but excessive levels may be lethal to the bearer.
effect.sona.insane.description: Reduces armor, increases movement speed, and causes the target to attack all nearby entities indiscriminately.
effect.sona.laceration.description: Action tears open your wounds, causing you to take damage.
effect.sona.maim.description: Reduces healing efficiency and natural regeneration.
effect.sona.sliminess.description: Coats the target in sticky slime, greatly reducing movement speed. Reacts with Ignition, Frost, and Corrosion to trigger chain effects.
effect.sona.stun.description: Prevents the target from taking any action.
msg.sona.update_log_1: §a§l[Sona]§r Thank you for using Sona Survival 101.
msg.sona.update_log_2: §a§l[Sona]§r The new version introduces the following major features:
msg.sona.update_log_3: §a§l[Sona]§r 1.Infection Zone Settings: Areas now generate with a certain level of infection.
msg.sona.update_log_4: §a§l[Sona]§r Different infection levels produce different effects. If you wish to disable this feature
msg.sona.update_log_5: §a§l[Sona]§r or customize how infection zones generate, you can configure it in the settings file.
msg.sona.update_log_6: §a§l[Sona]§r 2.Revamped Injury System: The bleeding system has been completely overhauled.
msg.sona.update_log_7: §a§l[Sona]§r 3.New Camouflage Effect: Players will no longer be able to see creatures with camouflage effects from a distance.
msg.sona.update_log_8: §a§l[Sona]§r This message can be disabled in the configuration file.
tooltip.sona.rot.heavily_spoiled: Uggh! Is it really still edible?
tooltip.sona.rot.slightly_spoiled: It has some mold and a slight rancid smell.
tooltip.sona.rot.spoiled: I hope it's not poisonous to eat…
tooltip.sona.rust.brand_new: Not a specks of rust on its polished surface!!
tooltip.sona.rust.heavily_rusted: Is this an artifact just dug out of the dirt?
